title: satureja calamintha subsp. glandulosa
intro: Satureja calamintha subsp. glandulosa, also known as glandular savory, is a subspecies of the Satureja calamintha plant, which is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Satureja calamintha subsp. glandulosa include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Satureja calamintha subsp. glandulosa can be prepared as a tea, oil, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to make infusions, salves, and other herbal preparations.
